adjustments.rationale: Ch26 emotional baseline was correctly quiet but risked reader fatigue from sustained flatness. Ch27 introduces 0.5s perceptual brightness/color temperature variance in the old cement transition section — light through building gap at reduced autumn zenith angle produces a different color ('冷了一档' vs Ch26 same moment). The difference is perceived but unnamed — not labeled as emotion, not analyzed. '感知帧携带了与昨天不同的亮度——安静有亮度变化——亮度变化在安静中' — quiet baseline retains a brightness gradient

Ch26 payoff was dominated by information advance and world-deepening without emotional release. Ch27 embeds lightweight emotional payoff via checkpoint scene evolution — forms stack changes from single to two stacks, wall notice posted (new paper/no curling), queue morphology different, voices from queue discussing required materials. Payoff is not a major reveal — it is '变化本身即回报' — the world is active, time passes at the checkpoint too. '不是评估在进化——是时间在检查站外侧留下了痕迹。'

Ch26 maintained assessment+collection intersection at information layer — confirmed co-presence but did not advance to parameter-layer normalization. Ch27 embeds intersection as body-perceived days at triangle space squat-stand transition: '身体知道走了几天。不是数出来的...不是计数——是身体在冷却的路面/在光线的色温/在煤烟浓度/在枯叶碎裂的声场深度中——知道了走了几天。两天倒计时的同一时间轴——在三角形空间蹲下与站起的动作之间——在场。不在数字——在身体知道。' — intersection advanced from 'knowing both countdowns exist' to 'body knows days without counting'

budget.pacing_notes: vol 2 day two — assessment density increase from single point to distributed presence across walking segments. Emotional nuance introduced within quiet baseline — brightness/color temperature variance at old cement transition. Checkpoint scene evolution provides micro-payoff through world-activity evidence. Walking parameters unchanged from Ch26 (door frame plateau, narrow alley exclusion, format string [s] maintained, engine sound rhythm steady). Autumn deepening continues — light zenith angle reduced further, accumulated offset ~2.5-3 paper thicknesses. Transition words: 0.

感知帧携带了与昨天不同的亮度——安静有亮度变化——亮度变化在安静中
不是评估在进化——是时间在检查站外侧留下了痕迹。
两天倒计时的同一时间轴——在场。不在数字——在身体知道。
